Impact Pillar

Environmental Conservation

Support tree planting, community awareness, and sustainable tourism initiatives.

Our Programs

We integrate conservation in tourism through eco-conscious experiences, community education, and sustainability campaigns near Volcanoes National Park.

  • Community tree planting & nursery preparation
  • Conservation storytelling in cultural experiences
  • Eco-friendly tourism awareness programs
  • School and group educational engagements

Donate to Conservation

Logged-in registered clients can track donations in their dashboard.
